title: Affiliate Disclosure
description: How we make money and why it doesn't affect our reviews.
content:
TrueTopReviews is reader-supported. When you purchase through links on our site, we may earn an affiliate commission at no additional cost to you.

## Why You Can Trust Us

Our reviews are completely independent. We never accept payment for reviews, and companies cannot pay to be featured or ranked higher on our lists. Our editorial team makes all ranking decisions based solely on our testing and analysis.

## How Affiliate Links Work

When you click a "Visit Site" button and make a purchase, the company pays us a small commission. This does not affect the price you pay. These commissions help fund our extensive testing process and allow us to keep our content free for everyone.
